checks.message: OpenAI upstream should use HTTPS to avoid plaintext transport.
checks.fix: Set proxy.upstream.openai to an https:// URL.

checks.message: Anthropic upstream should use HTTPS to avoid plaintext transport.
checks.fix: Set proxy.upstream.anthropic to an https:// URL.

checks.message: Loop detection is disabled - repeated request loops may go undetected.
Loop block threshold above 5 may allow expensive loops before blocking.
No daily budget configured - agent spending is not bounded.
checks.fix: Set budgets.daily to a finite USD amount (for example 10.0).

checks.message: No rate_limit rule found in policy rules.
checks.fix: Add a rate_limit rule with max_requests_per_minute.

checks.message: No budget_limit rule found in policy rules.
checks.fix: Add a budget_limit rule with max_cost_per_call and optional daily_budget.

checks.message: Session recording is disabled - forensic replay is limited.
Threat intelligence is disabled - known threat signatures are not applied.
API token is missing or too short.
checks.fix: Set api.token to a strong token with at least 12 characters.

checks.message: Default trust tier is too permissive.
checks.fix: Set default_trust_tier to a lower tier (for example intern).

checks.message: Alerting is disabled - operational incidents may be missed.
checks.fix: Set alerts.enabled: true and configure Telegram or webhook targets.

checks.message: Proxy connection pool size must be greater than zero.
checks.fix: Set proxy.connection_pool.max_total to a positive integer (for example 50).
